name: Grupo Hotelero Santa Fe, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: Grupo Hotelero Santa Fe, S.A.B. de C.V. acquires, develops, and operates city and beach hotels in Mexico. It operates in three segments: Urban Services, Resort Services, and Operator and Holding. The company operates a portfolio of hotels under owned brands, such as Krystal Resorts, Krystal Grand, Krystal Beach, and Krystal Urban; and franchises licensed brands, including Hilton, Hyatt, Marriott and Accor, and others, as well as operates third party hotels. It operates hotels in the 4 stars, 5 stars, and Gran Tourism markets. The company has a strategic alliance with AMResorts and private investors to develop the Breathless Tulum Resort & Spa, a tourism category resort. Grupo Hotelero Santa Fe, S.A.B. de C.V. is based in Mexico City, Mexico.
